topology.summary: One DU and one cell serve a declared four-UE cohort with per-UE evidence and rollback visibility.

blast_radius.max_change_scope: one named DU, one named cell, and the declared UE cohort
blast_radius.operator_impact: A bad change may impact the declared UE cohort, but it must not imply generalized scheduler or throughput parity.
blocked_until: per-UE attach and session evidence is visible
scheduler saturation assumptions are called out explicitly

required_checks: the UE cohort matches the profile
reviewers can inspect per-UE success and failure outcomes
the single-lane fallback path remains named

restore_actions: remove the additional UE state beyond the single-lane baseline
rollback_triggers: one or more declared UEs cannot reach a clean verify state
scheduler or session state becomes non-auditable

success_criteria: each declared UE has explicit attach, session, and ping status
the rollback decision can be replayed for the whole cohort

manual_review: confirm the repo still avoids throughput or scheduler timing claims

non_claims: no broad topology parity claim outside the declared profile
